query:
UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 15 
WHERE categoryId != 15 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%vegano%' OR name LIKE '%Vegano%' OR name LIKE '%vegan%' OR name LIKE '%Vegan%'
    OR name LIKE '%vegetariano%' OR name LIKE '%Vegetariano%'
    OR name LIKE '%açaí%' OR name LIKE '%Açaí%' OR name LIKE '%acai%' OR name LIKE '%Acai%'
    OR name LIKE '%juice%' OR name LIKE '%Juice%');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 15 
WHERE categoryId != 15 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%vegano%' OR name LIKE '%Vegano%' OR name LIKE '%vegan%' OR name LIKE '%Vegan%'
    OR name LIKE '%vegetariano%' OR name LIKE '%Vegetariano%'
    OR name LIKE '%açaí%' OR name LIKE '%Açaí%' OR name LIKE '%acai%' OR name LIKE '%Acai%'
    OR name LIKE '%juice%' OR name LIKE '%Juice%');
